error_signature: Both workflows are not triggering simultaneously
title: Telegram triggers not working simultaneously
symptom: When activating two workflows with Telegram triggers, only one workflow triggers at a time. The second workflow does not activate until the first one is disabled.
not_this_if: Webhooks are correctly configured for both
root_cause: The issue arises when both Telegram triggers are configured to use the same webhook URL, which prevents them from functioning independently. Each trigger must have a unique webhook to receive messages simultaneously.
fix_steps: Check the Production URL for both Telegram trigger nodes to ensure they are different.
Remove one of the Telegram trigger nodes from the workflow.
Add a new Telegram trigger node from the nodes panel instead of copying the old one.
Configure the new trigger with the correct bot token and settings.
agent_instruction: Ensure each Telegram trigger node has a unique webhook by adding a new trigger node instead of copying.
